series_metadata.series_description: Log containing Ohio State Number (OSN), holding agency, number from screeners list, date requested government acquisition price. When property is approved for pickup by GSA then add: amount of items received, whether withdrawn by holding agency and amount of monies withdrawn, rejection and reason if applicable, any direct transfer and dollar amount of overages and/or shortages. Used to track federal property by its OSN.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in operating system Federal review
